name: playwright-framework-js
description: Robust Playwright framework with POM, Excel, Allure, HTML report, API, CI/CD

scripts.allure:report: allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && allure open allure-report
scripts.posttest: cp -r test-results/html-report saved-reports/html-$(date +"%Y%m%d-%H%M%S") && cp -r allure-report saved-reports/allure-$(date +"%Y%m%d-%H%M%S")

author: Gaurav
